description: Render and auto-save the GO decision table figure as provenance
code:
import pandas as pd, matplotlib, os
matplotlib.use("Agg"); import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
print("cwd:", os.getcwd(), "| writable:", os.access(os.getcwd(), os.W_OK))

go_tbl = pd.DataFrame([
 ["GO:0003955","NAD(P)H dehydrogenase (quinone) activity","IBA","GO_REF:0000033","REMOVE / NOT",
  "Substrate-incorrect (NQO2 uses NRH); paralog carry-over; not ancestor of GO:0001512"],
 ["GO:0001512","dihydronicotinamide riboside quinone reductase activity","IDA(+IEA)","PMID:18254726","RETAIN",
  "Matches NQO2 EC 1.10.5.1; already experimentally supported"],
], columns=["GO_ID","Label","Evidence","Reference","Action","Rationale"])

fig,ax=plt.subplots(figsize=(12.5,2.0)); ax.axis("off")
t=ax.table(cellText=go_tbl.values, colLabels=go_tbl.columns, loc="center", cellLoc="left")
t.auto_set_font_size(False); t.set_fontsize(8); t.scale(1,1.7)
for j in range(len(go_tbl.columns)): t[0,j].set_facecolor("#20303f"); t[0,j].set_text_props(color="w",weight="bold")
ax.set_title("NQO2 (P16083) GO MF decision: REMOVE IBA GO:0003955 (NAD(P)H), RETAIN GO:0001512 (NRH)  |  structural basis: NQO1 has 43 extra C-term residues",
             fontsize=8.5, weight="bold")
plt.tight_layout()
for p in ["NQO2_GO_decision_table.png", os.path.join(os.getcwd(),"NQO2_GO_decision_table.png")]:
    try: plt.savefig(p, dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight"); print("saved:",p); break
    except Exception as e: print("fail",p,repr(e))
print(go_tbl.to_string(index=False))
